data.title: Tesla Offers 3 Years Of FSD, Premium Connectivity, And Free Supercharging For $5,000, But Is It Worth It?
data.description: EV giant Tesla is offering new Model S and X customers an option to purchase its full self-driving (FSD) driver assistance technology on their new rides for a reduced price of $5000 for three years.
